approved.qualification: Platform claim; not a flight-qualified system.
approved.text: Built a ROS 2 Raspberry Pi tracking and autonomy platform with formal IMM, multi-hypothesis tracking, deterministic replay, and machine-readable evidence contracts.

approved.qualification: Numerical equivalence on pinned vectors, not independent physical accuracy.
approved.text: Implemented an Eigen-based C++ estimator library and matched C++ and Python outputs across 24 frozen synthetic trials within declared numerical tolerances.

approved.qualification: Synthetic analytic truth; controlled physical truth remains pending.
approved.text: Executed a 24-trial deterministic controlled-truth software campaign across eight motion and visibility-loss families using identical estimator inputs.

approved.qualification: Deterministic software injection; selected faults still require direct hardware/runtime reproduction.
approved.text: Implemented and verified detection, isolation, status, recovery, and retained evidence for 12 reproducible software-injected faults.
Benchmarked ROS 2 QoS behavior, estimator execution, CPU, memory, temperature, and throttling on a Raspberry Pi using 8 declared runtime scenarios.

approved.qualification: Synthetic and stored-evidence regression protection; physical campaign data will be added after collection.
approved.text: Added one-command deterministic regression gates with 47 requirements and evidence checks plus CI artifact export.

prohibited_or_pending.reason: G3 measurement collection and at least 20 paired controlled physical trials are not complete.
prohibited_or_pending.text: Hardware-validated room-scale position or velocity accuracy across the formal campaign.

prohibited_or_pending.reason: No physical paired statistics support this claim, and frozen synthetic results do not justify a universal superiority statement.
Bench timing and resource evidence does not establish operating-system hard-real-time bounds or certification; RT-001 and RT-002 did not meet their predeclared bench limits in the final run.
The mission simulation assumes a known local observer pose and map.
prohibited_or_pending.text: Autonomous flight with VIO, SLAM, PX4, or independent observer-pose estimation.
